January 2025 
107
artifact_summary: Visual guide for Knife Gate and Knife Valve states in industrial control systems.
artifact_blurb: A technical reference sheet for SCADA interface design, displaying distinct graphical representations for Knife Gate and Knife Valve actuators. The grid categorizes components by operational state (Open/Closed) and offers multiple visual style options to ensure clear status indication in industrial monitoring dashboards.
